title: Mysterious UFO hotspots uncovered around underwater canyons off US coasts
description: New research analyzed more than 80,000 UFO reports and found that there are 'clusters' of reports of sightings near submarine canyons in the continental US.

title: Trump called for more alien files. UFO disclosure bill passed in 2023

title: Avi Loeb to Newsmax: Trump Order on UFO Files Signals Data Release Push
